message:
test(ondisk): add parse_dev_item and MmpBlock to adversarial corpus

Extends the adversarial corpus tests to cover the newly exposed parsers:
- Ext4MmpBlock::parse_from_bytes for MMP block parsing
- parse_dev_item for btrfs device item parsing

Ensures all parsers are exercised against malformed inputs without panicking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
